testcase.name: Navbar — keyboard shortcuts link > exposes /help/shortcuts inside the user dropdown menu (desktop)
Navbar — keyboard shortcuts link > exposes /help/shortcuts inside the mobile menu

testcase.name: NotificationPermissionBanner — requestPermission gating > does NOT call requestPermission while auth is still loading
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: NotificationPermissionBanner — requestPermission gating > does NOT call requestPermission on public auth routes (even when authenticated)
NotificationPermissionBanner — requestPermission gating > does NOT call requestPermission on /privacy, /terms, /reset-password, /install, /help
NotificationPermissionBanner — requestPermission gating > DOES auto-prompt once after auth resolves on a private route
NotificationPermissionBanner — requestPermission gating > does NOT re-prompt if the user was already prompted (per-user flag)
useGlobalShortcuts > navigates to /dashboard on g then d
useGlobalShortcuts > navigates to /jobs on g then j
useGlobalShortcuts > opens /help/shortcuts when ? is pressed
useGlobalShortcuts > focuses an input[type=search] when / is pressed
useGlobalShortcuts > ignores shortcuts while typing in an input
useGlobalShortcuts > aborts the g-sequence after timeout
useTelegramLinkPolling > polls profile every interval while enabled and userId is set
useTelegramLinkPolling > stops polling immediately when userId becomes null (sign-out)
useTelegramLinkPolling > stops polling immediately when userId changes (account switch) and ignores stale in-flight responses
useTelegramLinkPolling > does not poll when enabled is false
useTelegramLinkPolling > calls onLinked when profile returns telegram_id
useTelegramLinkPolling > never registers a setInterval when enabled=false from the start (showTelegramCTA=false)
useTelegramLinkPolling > does not register setInterval when userId is null even if enabled=true
useTelegramLinkPolling > registers setInterval only after enabled flips from false to true
extractStoragePath > returns null for empty string
extractStoragePath > strips the 'receipts/' prefix from a direct storage path
extractStoragePath > extracts path from a legacy public URL
extractStoragePath > extracts path from a signed URL (with token query)
extractStoragePath > extracts path from a generic /object/receipts/ URL (no public/sign segment)
extractStoragePath > decodes URL-encoded characters in the path
extractStoragePath > returns null for an unrelated URL
extractStoragePath > handles signed URL with multiple query params
extractStoragePath > detects receipt filename and kind
formatRelativeArabic > invalid inputs > returns empty string for null
formatRelativeArabic > invalid inputs > returns empty string for undefined
formatRelativeArabic > invalid inputs > returns empty string for empty string
formatRelativeArabic > invalid inputs > returns empty string for invalid date string
formatRelativeArabic > invalid inputs > returns empty string for invalid Date object
formatRelativeArabic > seconds > returns 'قبل لحظات' for less than 45 seconds
formatRelativeArabic > minutes > returns 'قبل دقيقة' for ~1 minute
formatRelativeArabic > minutes > returns 'قبل دقيقتين' for exactly 2 minutes
formatRelativeArabic > minutes > returns 'قبل N دقائق' for 3-10 minutes
formatRelativeArabic > minutes > returns 'قبل N دقيقة' for 11-59 minutes
formatRelativeArabic > hours > returns 'قبل ساعة' for ~1 hour
formatRelativeArabic > hours > returns 'قبل ساعتين' for exactly 2 hours
formatRelativeArabic > hours > returns 'قبل N ساعات' for 3-10 hours
formatRelativeArabic > hours > returns 'قبل N ساعة' for 11-23 hours
formatRelativeArabic > days > returns 'قبل يوم' for ~1 day
formatRelativeArabic > days > returns 'قبل يومين' for exactly 2 days
formatRelativeArabic > days > returns 'قبل N أيام' for 3-10 days
formatRelativeArabic > days > returns 'قبل N يوماً' for 11-29 days
formatRelativeArabic > months > returns 'قبل شهر' for ~1 month
formatRelativeArabic > months > returns 'قبل شهرين' for exactly 2 months
formatRelativeArabic > months > returns 'قبل N أشهر' for 3-10 months
formatRelativeArabic > years > returns 'قبل سنة' for ~1 year
formatRelativeArabic > years > returns 'قبل سنتين' for exactly 2 years
formatRelativeArabic > years > returns 'قبل N سنوات' for 3-10 years
formatRelativeArabic > years > returns 'قبل N سنة' for 11+ years
formatRelativeArabic > future dates > replaces 'قبل' with 'خلال' for future minutes
formatRelativeArabic > future dates > replaces 'قبل' with 'خلال' for future days
formatRelativeArabic > future dates > handles 'خلال لحظات' for near-future
formatRelativeArabic > input types > accepts ISO string
formatRelativeArabic > input types > accepts Date object
formatLinkedSince > returns empty string for invalid input
formatLinkedSince > replaces 'قبل' with 'مرتبط منذ' for past dates
formatLinkedSince > replaces 'قبل لحظات' correctly
formatLinkedSince > does not transform future-prefix 'خلال'
formatFullDateAr > returns empty string for invalid input
formatFullDateAr > returns a non-empty localized string for valid date
formatFullDateAr > accepts ISO string
PaymentSettings — تحديث فوري بعد upsert > يحدّث الحقول الأربعة فوراً بعد نجاح upsert قبل اكتمال invalidateQueries
testcase.system-err: [applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [90mundefined[39m ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: PaymentSettings — تحديث فوري بعد upsert > عند data.length===0: لا تُحدَّث الواجهة، يظهر toast خطأ واضح، ولا تُستدعى invalidateQueries
testcase.system-err:
[applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [90mundefined[39m
step 4 — upsert returned 0 rows (silent RLS reject)

testcase.name: PaymentSettings — تطابق شكل cache بين useQuery و setQueryData > ✅ النجاح: useQuery يكتب كائناً واحداً، وsetQueryData بعد upsert يكتب نفس الشكل
PaymentSettings — تطابق شكل cache بين useQuery و setQueryData > ⛔ رفض RLS (data.length===0): cache لا يتغير بعد فشل upsert
testcase.system-err:
[applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [90mundefined[39m
step 4 — upsert returned 0 rows (silent RLS reject)

testcase.name: PaymentSettings — تطابق شكل cache بين useQuery و setQueryData > 📭 لا يوجد صف (maybeSingle => null): useQuery يكتب null في cache
testcase.system-err:
[applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [90mundefined[39m
[applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [1mnull[22m

testcase.name: PaymentSettings — تطابق شكل cache بين useQuery و setQueryData > 🛡️ EMPTY_SAVED_ROW: upsert يرجع [null] → لا يُستدعى setQueryData ويظهر toast.error
testcase.system-err:
[applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [90mundefined[39m
step 5 — savedRow is null/undefined despite non-empty data array

testcase.name: PaymentSettings — تطابق شكل cache بين useQuery و setQueryData > 🔑 QUERY_KEY متطابق حرفياً بين useQuery و setQueryData (لا اختلاف array/object key order)
PaymentSettings — تطابق شكل cache بين useQuery و setQueryData > 🚫 فشل RLS لا يُغيّر قيم الحقول المرئية ولا يستدعي toast.success
testcase.system-err:
[applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [90mundefined[39m
step 4 — upsert returned 0 rows (silent RLS reject)

testcase.name: PaymentSettings — ضغط حفظ مرتين متتاليتين > 🔁 ضغط حفظ مرتين متتاليتين: cache النهائي يطابق آخر upsert بدون تداخل
PaymentSettings — ضغط حفظ مرتين متتاليتين > 🔁 ضغطتان ناجحتان متسلسلتان: cache يساوي تماماً نتيجة آخر upsert
PaymentSettings — تطبيع شكل الصف بعد upsert بأنواع مختلطة > 🧬 upsert يُرجع حقولاً بأنواع مختلطة → cache يحتفظ بشكل PaymentSettingsRow المُطبَّع
PaymentSettings — تطبيع شكل الصف بعد upsert بأنواع مختلطة > 🧬 upsert يُرجع كائناً بدون id (نوع صحيح لكن بيانات ناقصة) → التطبيع يرفضه ولا يُكتب cache
testcase.system-err:
[applyPaymentSettings] تم تجاهل التحديث: data فارغ [90mundefined[39m
step 5 — savedRow is null/undefined despite non-empty data array

testcase.name: SubscriberHome — verify button resilience > re-enables the verify button when the network request rejects
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: SubscriberHome — verify button resilience > re-enables the verify button after the 10s safety timeout fires
SubscriberHome — verify button resilience > cancel button aborts an in-flight check and re-enables verify
SubscriberHome — user switch invalidates in-flight verify > ignores a late successful response when the user switched accounts mid-flight
SubscriberHome — user switch invalidates in-flight verify > ignores a late error response after the user signed out / switched
chat_messages INSERT policy (conversation ownership) > allows a user to insert into their own conversation
chat_messages INSERT policy (conversation ownership) > REJECTS inserting a message into another user's conversation
chat_messages INSERT policy (conversation ownership) > rejects spoofing user_id to match the conversation owner
chat_messages INSERT policy (conversation ownership) > rejects unauthenticated inserts
chat_messages INSERT policy (conversation ownership) > rejects inserts referencing a non-existent conversation
example > should pass
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > allows updating only moderator_action / moderator_action_at / moderator_id
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > REJECTS changing status
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > REJECTS changing admin_notes
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > REJECTS changing reviewed_by / reviewed_at
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > REJECTS changing receipt_url or PII fields
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > REJECTS changing ai_verification_result or ai_fraud_detected
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > REJECTS changing user_id, package_id, service_type, countries
subscription_requests moderator UPDATE policy > REJECTS update from non-moderator users
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > payment_settings > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > payment_settings > BLOCKS moderator UPDATE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > payment_settings > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > payment_settings > BLOCKS regular user writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > payment_settings > BLOCKS anonymous writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > site_settings > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > site_settings > BLOCKS moderator UPDATE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > site_settings > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > site_settings > BLOCKS regular user writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > site_settings > BLOCKS anonymous writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > user_roles > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > user_roles > BLOCKS moderator UPDATE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > user_roles > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > user_roles > BLOCKS regular user writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > user_roles > BLOCKS anonymous writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscriptions > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscriptions > BLOCKS moderator UPDATE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscriptions > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscriptions > BLOCKS regular user writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscriptions > BLOCKS anonymous writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > email_notifications > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > email_notifications > BLOCKS moderator UPDATE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > email_notifications > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > email_notifications > BLOCKS regular user writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > email_notifications > BLOCKS anonymous writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_notifications > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_notifications > BLOCKS moderator UPDATE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_notifications > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_notifications > BLOCKS regular user writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_notifications > BLOCKS anonymous writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_monitor_checks > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_monitor_checks > BLOCKS moderator UPDATE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_monitor_checks > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_monitor_checks > BLOCKS regular user writes
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > visa_monitor_checks > BLOCKS anonymous writes

Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscription_requests (moderator UPDATE allowed, others blocked) > ALLOWS moderator UPDATE (column-restricted; see moderatorUpdatePolicy.test.ts)
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscription_requests (moderator UPDATE allowed, others blocked) > BLOCKS moderator INSERT
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > subscription_requests (moderator UPDATE allowed, others blocked) > BLOCKS moderator DELETE
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > settings_audit_log (append-only) > BLOCKS UPDATE for everyone including admin
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > settings_audit_log (append-only) > BLOCKS DELETE for everyone including admin
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > settings_audit_log (append-only) > ALLOWS admin INSERT only
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > Privilege matrix invariants > admin always >= moderator on every (table, op)
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > Privilege matrix invariants > anonymous never gets more privilege than authenticated user
Moderator write boundaries across admin-managed tables > Privilege matrix invariants > moderator has EXACTLY ONE write grant beyond regular users (subscription_requests UPDATE)
payment_settings admin write — no silent failures > admin UPDATE returns the affected row
payment_settings admin write — no silent failures > admin INSERT (no existing row) creates a fresh row
payment_settings admin write — no silent failures > REJECTS write when no auth session is present
payment_settings admin write — no silent failures > REJECTS write from a non-admin user (RLS denied)
payment_settings admin write — no silent failures > preserves untouched fields on partial UPDATE
payment_settings admin write — no silent failures > treats empty result rows as a failure (silent-success guard)
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > a regular user sees ONLY their own row
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > a regular user CANNOT read another user's row
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > a regular user CANNOT read an admin's row (no privilege escalation discovery)
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > a moderator (non-admin) sees ONLY their own row, not others
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > an admin sees ALL rows
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > an admin can read another user's row
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > an unauthenticated caller sees NO rows
user_roles SELECT policy — non-admins cannot read other users' rows > the restrictive policy still blocks non-admins even if a permissive policy would otherwise leak
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > INSERT > admin CAN insert any role row
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > INSERT > regular user CANNOT insert an admin row for themselves (privilege escalation blocked)
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > INSERT > regular user CANNOT insert any row, even a 'user' row for themselves
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > INSERT > regular user CANNOT insert a row targeting another user
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > INSERT > moderator (non-admin) CANNOT insert any row, including granting themselves admin
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > INSERT > anonymous caller CANNOT insert
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > UPDATE > admin CAN update any row
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > UPDATE > regular user CANNOT promote their own row to admin
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > UPDATE > regular user CANNOT update another user's row
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > UPDATE > moderator (non-admin) CANNOT update any row
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > UPDATE > anonymous caller CANNOT update
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > DELETE > admin CAN delete any row
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > DELETE > regular user CANNOT delete their own row (cannot self-revoke or tamper)
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > DELETE > regular user CANNOT delete an admin's row to take over
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > DELETE > moderator (non-admin) CANNOT delete any row
user_roles write policies — only admins can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE > DELETE > anonymous caller CANNOT delete
ReceiptLightbox - shortcuts help dialog > renders the desktop 'دليل كامل' help button

testcase.name: ReceiptLightbox - shortcuts help dialog > renders the mobile help (?) button
ReceiptLightbox - shortcuts help dialog > opens the shortcuts dialog when the desktop help button is clicked
ReceiptLightbox - shortcuts help dialog > opens the shortcuts dialog when the mobile help (?) button is clicked
ReceiptThumbnail > forwards ref to the zoom button
ReceiptThumbnail > allows focusing the button via the forwarded ref
ReceiptThumbnail > calls onOpen when zoom button is clicked
ReceiptThumbnail > calls onDownload when download button is clicked
ReceiptThumbnail > disables download button while downloading
ShortcutsPage – search filtering > renders all categories by default (التنقل العام / عارض الوصل / إيماءات اللمس)
ShortcutsPage – search filtering > filters shortcuts by Arabic label substring
ShortcutsPage – search filtering > filters by key chip text (case-insensitive)
ShortcutsPage – search filtering > matches single-character key like '/' for global search shortcut
ShortcutsPage – search filtering > shows empty-state and a clear button when nothing matches
ShortcutsPage – search filtering > displays the result count in the live region
ShortcutsPage – search filtering > clears the search query when Esc is pressed inside the input
